It’s now easier to find, reuse, and build on the files you upload and create in ChatGPT. You can quickly reference files in a chat using recent files in the toolbar, ask ChatGPT about something you’ve uploaded, or browse your files in the new Library tab in the web sidebar. Rolling out globally for Plus, Pro, and Business users, and coming soon to users in the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK.

Seedance 2.0 is finally available on Topview. If you have been following AI video, you already know Seedance 2.0 is in a league of its own. People waited a long time for this but It's here. Topview Agent V2 is built specifically for long-form video. Smart automation meets pinpoint control, studio-quality video of any length, for every industry. - Generate multiple AI-powered scenes inside one workflow - Unlimited video duration, not capped at 15 seconds - Agent V2 breaks your raw idea into a full structured storyboard automatically - Edit, rearrange, and refine scenes on a unified timeline - Business Annual accounts get 365 days of unlimited Seedance 2.0 access Intuitive enough for beginners, deep enough for pros . Sponsored by @TopviewAIhq 1/2

You can now teach a humanoid robot tennis without showing it a single real match. LATENT is a new paper from Tsinghua University. It skips recording perfect game footage entirely. Instead, it uses short, messy clips of basic moves. A forehand swing here, a sidestep there. Just pieces, not full matches. A two-layer system does the heavy lifting: 1. The bottom layer watches clips and learns individual moves. 2. The top layer figures out when to use which move and fixes mistakes on the fly. It runs on a Unitree G1 robot. The machine holds rallies with real humans. Balls fly in at 15-30 m/s. It reacts within milliseconds. What made this possible: > No clean training data required > No real match recordings needed > No human remote-controlling the robot > Works outside simulation too The same approach could work for soccer and parkour. Any sport where collecting clean data is nearly impossible.
